prestazioni: Replace the stock 2.7L RPE (Radical Performance Engines) V8 (RPE-SR8-2700) with a stroked 3.2L RPE V8 (RPE-SR8-3200) featuring forged Mahle pistons (12.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet steel crankshaft for 500+ hp at 10,500 RPM with a 12,000 RPM redline, paired with a Quaife ATB differential and a 6-speed sequential Hewland LD200 gearbox with straight-cut gears and a Sachs twin-plate carbon clutch

Install a custom dry-sump oiling system by Dailey Engineering with a 12-quart oil tank, dual scavenge pumps, and a Peterson Fluid Systems external oil cooler to maintain consistent lubrication under 3.5G lateral loads, complemented by a Motec M150 ECU with bespoke traction control and launch control maps optimized for Radical’s carbon-fiber monocoque chassis

Upgrade the stock AP Racing CP5550 front and CP5555 rear calipers with 380mm two-piece carbon-carbon rotors from Carbon Revolution, paired with Ferodo DS3000 brake pads and braided steel lines, while integrating a Bosch Motorsport ABS system with 12-stage adjustability for track-specific brake bias tuning
estetica: Replace the stock Radical SR8 front splitter with a carbon-fiber APR Performance GT-250 widebody kit, including extended wheel arches to accommodate 18x12.5-inch BBS FI-R wheels (ET35) with 325/680R18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, and a custom 3D-printed titanium rear diffuser with integrated Gurney flaps for 400+ kg of downforce at 160 mph

Install a full carbon-fiber body panel upgrade from Radical’s in-house composites division, including a removable roof panel with a quick-release mechanism, and a rear wing derived from the Radical RXC GT3 program, featuring adjustable dual-element carbon-fiber blades with 12 positions and a DRS-style drag reduction system activated via a steering wheel button

Integrate a custom LED lighting system by Hella Rallye 4000, including sequential turn signals, a central high-mounted brake light with a carbon-fiber housing, and a Motec C127 dash display with a bespoke Radical-themed layout, replacing the stock analog gauges for real-time telemetry and lap-time comparison
